data.title: Flying Eyes Optics introduces Peregrine Titanium, their strongest and most comfortable frame yet, with aerospace-grade materials.
data.description: Austin, TX - Oct. 2, 2025 - Flying Eyes Optics, a top provider of performance eyewear for headgear, has introduced its latest groundbreaking frame: the Peregrine Titanium. This new frame combines aerospace-grade materials with state-of-the-art ergonomic design, setting a new standard in eyewear technology. The launch marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to innovate in the industry.

data.title: Precoro launches AI Assistant to speed up spend decisions. AI chatbot provides instant insights from purchasing data.
data.description: Today in New York, on October 2, 2025, Precoro, a platform specializing in procurement centralization and automation, introduced its AI Assistant. This chatbot, powered by artificial intelligence, is designed to provide immediate insights from purchasing data to finance, procurement, and accounts payable teams. The AI Assistant offers real-time information without the need for extensive manual searching.

data.title: Patricia Nash Designs donates $75K to Susan G. Komen®, hosts Texas benefit events. Shop for the Cure in Hurst and Fort Worth.
data.description: Join us for a special event in partnership with Dillard's featuring founder Patricia Nash. Explore the "Shop for the Cure" Pop-Up in Hurst, and attend an evening of "Leather, Legacy, and Style" in Fort Worth. Taking place on October 2, 2025, this event celebrates National Breast Cancer Awareness Month. Patricia Nash Designs invites you to engage with us at this meaningful occasion.

data.title: Alpine Intel acquired HMI, adding outdoor property claims support to its services. Expansion on Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: Alpine Intel, a top provider of forensic investigation and insurance intelligence services, has recently acquired HMI to enhance its offerings. The acquisition, announced in Charlotte, N.C. on October 2, 2025, brings outdoor property claims support to Alpine Intel's suite of services. This move will undoubtedly strengthen Alpine Intel's position in the industry and improve its capabilities in providing comprehensive insurance solutions.

data.title: Report on Contact Center Software Market Industry by ResearchAndMarkets.com predicts growth from $46.68B in 2025 to $384B by 2035 at 21.12% CAGR.
data.description: A recent industry report on the contact center software market forecasts significant growth in the sector, anticipating an increase in market size from USD 46.68 billion in 2025 to USD 384 billion by 2035. This growth translates to a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 21.12% over the forecast period. The report, titled "Contact Center Software Market Industry Trends and Global Forecasts to 2035," covers various aspects such as types of components, solutions, services, deployment modes, enterprises, end-users, and key geographical regions. This robust growth trajectory signals a promising outlook for the global contact center software market.

data.title: Priority Technology Holdings, Inc. acquires assets of DMSJV, LLC with $35 million boost to $1.0 billion loan.(Character count: 90)
data.description: Alpharetta-based Priority Technology Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRTH), a leading payments and banking solution provider, recently finalized the acquisition of select assets from DMSJV, LLC ("Dealer Merchant Services" or "DMS"). To facilitate this acquisition, they utilized a $35 million boost to their existing $1.0 billion broadly syndicated term loan. This strategic move aims to enhance Priority Technology's capabilities in collecting, storing, lending, and transferring funds, ultimately paving the way for increased revenue opportunities.
Rivian Reports Q3 Deliveries of 13,201 Vehicles, Surpassing Estimates of 12,995, and Projects Full-Year Delivery Range of 41,500 to 43,500 Units, Compared to Estimated 42,730

data.title: Destiny Wealth Partners earns prestigious 5-star designation as a top wealth management firm in the industry.
data.description: Destiny Wealth Partners, an independent SEC registered investment advisory firm based in TAVARES, Fla., has been recognized in the InvestmentNews list, showcasing the top-performing wealth management firms in the nation. This recognition underscores their excellence and performance in the industry. The achievement serves as a testament to the firm's commitment to providing exemplary financial services.

data.title: TRIP achieves $100M revenue, expands to 10k+ doors in US with Whole Foods launch. #1 calming beverage globally.
data.description: In New York on October 2, 2025, TRIP, the leading calming beverage worldwide, is expanding its presence in the U.S. market this autumn through significant successes in retail partnerships and the introduction of new flavors. With outstanding performance at Target and Sprouts in the first half of 2025, TRIP has secured a spot on the shelves of Whole Foods Market.

data.title: UN Senior Advisor Dr. Simona Marinescu joins IDCA as Economy Counsel on the Board of Directors, effective Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 2, 2025, IDCA revealed that Dr. Simona Marinescu, a Senior Advisor to the UN, has taken on the role of Economy Counsel within the IDCA Board of Directors. Dr. Marinescu brings with her a wealth of experience in global economic development. Throughout her career, she has demonstrated strong leadership skills and has contributed significantly to various initiatives. This new appointment underscores IDCA's commitment to enhancing its board with top talent.

data.title: A webinar by Xtalks on preclinical drug discovery emphasizes the importance of curated, interpretable data for decision-making.
data.description: Join our upcoming webinar to explore the critical role of preclinical data in decision-making processes. Discover the significance of curating, interpreting, and applying this data effectively. Gain valuable insights into the importance of transparency, interpretability, and reproducibility in enhancing the credibility of predictive technologies. Don't miss this opportunity to understand why these factors are crucial for ensuring the acceptance and trustworthiness of such technologies. Register now to secure your spot!

data.title: Webinar by Xtalks on significance of caregiver experience, impact on outcomes. Gain insights on capturing caregiver impact.
data.description: Join a free webinar to understand how caregiver burden impacts access, adherence, and long-term outcomes throughout the product lifecycle. Learn from experts as they provide practical methods for evaluating and quantifying caregiver influence in both clinical and real-world settings. Don't miss out on this valuable opportunity to enhance your understanding of this critical issue.

data.title: Alorica triples business in India with new locations in Bhartiya City, Bangalore, Mohali, creating 1,500 jobs.
data.description: Alorica Inc., a worldwide provider of digitally enhanced customer experiences, has revealed substantial investments in India. This includes the launch of a new facility in Bhartiya City and the enlargement of existing sites in Bangalore (Pritech Park campus) and Mohali. These strategic actions were taken to address a sudden rise in client requirements and have resulted in the generation of 1,500 additional jobs in the third quarter alone. This move has significantly expanded Alorica's presence in the country as part of its commitment to meet escalating demand.

data.title: Healthmine named to TIME's inaugural list of top HealthTech companies for innovation in member engagement and outcomes.
data.description: Healthmine has recently been acknowledged for its innovative approaches to member engagement in Dallas. The company has been commended for its effectiveness in achieving measurable outcomes for both clients and members.

data.title: OSI Systems gets $37M order for RF solutions to enhance national security, says president and CEO Ajay Mehra.
data.description: In Hawthorne, California, OSI Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSIS) revealed that its Security division secured a significant order worth around $37 million. The order entails providing sophisticated radio frequency (RF) communication and surveillance systems. Ajay Mehra, President and CEO of OSI Systems, expressed gratitude for the award and expressed eagerness to assist the customer in protecting national security through vital mission-critical systems.

data.title: Rivian produced 10,720 vehicles and delivered 13,201 in Q3 2025, narrowing 2025 delivery guidance to 41,500-43,500 vehicles.
data.description: Rivian Automotive, Inc. based in Irvine, California disclosed their production and delivery figures for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. During this period, they manufactured 10,720 vehicles at their production plant situated in Normal, Illinois, and successfully delivered 13,201 vehicles. These delivery numbers align with Rivian's projections. The company has revised its 2025 delivery estimate to a range of 41,500 to 43,500 vehicles. Additionally, they revealed that...

data.title: Movius partners with Vodafone, bringing secure communications to users; starting with Vodafone Germany, largest in Europe.
data.description: In Fremont, California, Movius, a prominent global provider of secure, AI-driven communications software, has recently unveiled a strategic partnership with Vodafone, a top telecommunications company. Beginning with Vodafone Germany, this collaboration aims to deliver enterprise-level secure communication solutions to customers of the largest mobile operator in Europe. The partnership guarantees that communications will be both secure and compliant on all mobile devices.

data.title: Global EHR market expected to reach $93 billion by 2035 with a 8.89% CAGR, starting from $36 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Electronic Health Records Market Industry Trends and Global Forecasts to 2035" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global electronic health records market is predicted to rise from USD 36 billion in 2025 to USD 93 billion by 2035, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.89% during the forecast period. Electronic Health Records (EHRs) play a vital role in the healthcare sector and are segmented based on type, system, application, therapeutic area, end-users, geography, and key players.
